articles.description: Follow live BBC coverage, text commentary, score updates and match stats from Aston Villa vs Nottingham Forest in the UEFA Europa League.

articles.description: Marcus North, a former Australia international and Durham's director of cricket, is set to become the first foreigner in charge of selecting the England men's team.
articles.title: Marcus North: Australian set to be named England selector

articles.description: Daniel Dubois responds to fellow British heavyweight Fabio Wardley's "bin-man" jibe by vowing to make the world champion pay for the "disrespect".
articles.title: Wardley vs Dubois: Challenger responds to 'bin-man' jibe before Saturday's heavyweight title fight

articles.description: The International Olympic Committee says a ban on Belarusian athletes and teams competing under the flag of their nation should be lifted but that the restrictions on Russia remain in place.
articles.title: International Olympic Committee lifts ban on Belarus but not Russia

articles.description: Khadija Shaw is likely to leave Manchester City this summer after talks stalled over a new contract.
articles.title: Manchester City: Khadija Shaw likely to leave Women's Super League champions this summer

articles.description: A rider has died after an accident in Superbike qualifying for the North West 200 international road race on Thursday.
articles.title: North West 200: Rider dies in Superbike accident at road race

articles.description: Jannik Sinner admits it is “tough to say” whether he would ever boycott a Grand Slam over prize money, but claims players are not getting the respect they deserve.
articles.title: Jannik Sinner: ATP world no.1 says players not getting respect they deserve amid Grand Slam boycott calls

articles.description: Live coverage of the final qualifying session at the 2026 North West 200 international road races at the famous triangle circuit on the north coast.
articles.title: North West 200 - final qualifying session

articles.description: A luxury package ticket is being advertised to "high rollers" for the MMA event which is being held to help mark 250 years of American independence.
articles.title: UFC Freedom 250: Why some White House event tickets could cost $1.5m
